critical_invariants: PCIe BAR0 discovery must follow PCI configuration space protocol exactly
BAR1 VRAM aperture base address must be read from PCIe config, never hardcoded
MMIO register read/write protocol: write-then-read-back for verification on control registers
Command queue format: each entry is 16 bytes with opcode, flags, address, size fields
GPU fence synchronization: fence write must complete before dependent operations proceed
VRAM bitmap must be consistent - alloc/free must be atomic with bitmap update
GPU initialization order: PCIe discovery -> BAR mapping -> engine reset -> queue setup
known_opportunities: MMIO batching: combine multiple register writes into single uncacheable write sequence
Command queue optimization: pre-build command chains to minimize queue submissions
Fence wait optimization: exponential backoff PAUSE loop instead of tight polling
VRAM allocator: batch small allocations into 2MB super-pages
Memory copy optimization: use GPU DMA engine for large transfers instead of CPU MMIO
Register shadow: cache frequently-read MMIO values in system RAM
Pipeline command queue submissions to overlap CPU and GPU work

immutable_regions.reason: GPU register offsets defined by NVIDIA hardware - cannot be changed
